title: Piggy Bank Panic
short_description: Penny the piggy bank can't keep count! Count coins, check what you can afford, and work out the change.
description: Penny the piggy bank is in a PANIC — her owner keeps buying things and she can't keep count of the grin coins (ツ) rattling around inside her! Count the coins she swallowed, check whether the skateboard is affordable, work out the change from a ツ10 note, and figure out how many weeks of saving it takes to reach the kite. Answer wrong and Penny faints dramatically. Younger players count coins and simple spending; older players handle decimal change and multi-item purchases. Every puzzle is freshly generated. A free online money, saving and financial-literacy game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the right amount before the timer runs out.
